summary: Tested Rainbow Bridge Wall feature: backend APIs (submit, pending, approve), frontend Wall tab on /farewell, Add Memorial modal, Dine allergen filtering, and Pet Home no-bottom-bar regression checks. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend flows verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Pre-existing: Duplicate React key TDB-2026-0578 in console (carried over from iteration 207 admin nav issue)
Pre-existing: 'Failed to fetch pets' error on login - ephemeral fetch error, not a blocker
verified_flows: ✅ Farewell page - 4 tabs: 🌷 Farewell, 🐕 Services, 📍 Find Care, 🌈 Wall
✅ Wall tab (4th) shows Mystique's memorial card with photo, breed (Shih Tzu), owner (Dipali), tribute message
✅ 'Add Your Pet's Memorial' button visible for logged-in users on Wall tab
✅ Add Memorial modal opens with all fields: Pet Name, Breed, Crossing Date, Photo URL, Tribute Message
✅ Form submission succeeds — 'Memorial Submitted' confirmation shown with pending review message
✅ POST /api/rainbow-bridge/submit returns 200 with success=true and memorial_id
✅ GET /api/admin/rainbow-bridge/pending returns only pending memorials with correct structure
✅ PATCH /api/admin/rainbow-bridge/{id}/approve changes status to active and removes from pending list
✅ Dine page - Mira Picks section present ('Mira's Picks', 'See Mira's Picks')
✅ Dine page - chicken appears only in allergen filter labels ('No Chicken' badges, Mira explanation) — products filtered correctly
✅ Pet Home (/pet-home) — no fixed bottom navigation bar present
✅ Farewell ios-tab-bar shows all 4 correct tabs
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_BuddyPendingTest memorial during testing — cleaned up via reject endpoint after approval test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rainbow Bridge Wall fully implemented and tested. Mystique's memorial is on the wall (status=active). Submit→Pending→Approve flow verified end-to-end. Dine allergen filtering working (chicken filtered from Mojo's products, only appears in 'No Chicken' labels). Pet Home has no bottom nav. 4-tab farewell bar confirmed. Pre-existing issues: duplicate React key TDB-2026-0578 (admin nav), occasional fetch pet errors.
